message:
fix: resolve proptest failures with Unicode boundary and pattern checks

- Fix process substitution detection order in patterns.rs
  - Move subshell/process substitution check before redirection checks
  - Ensures <(cmd) and >(cmd) are detected as "subshell execution" not
    "input/output redirected"

- Fix Unicode boundary panics in proptest_tests.rs
  - Add safe_truncate() helper that respects UTF-8 char boundaries
  - Prevents panics when truncating strings containing multi-byte chars
  - Applied to all string preview logging in proptest

- Fix path expansion edge case for ~//* patterns
  - Strip leading slashes from path rest to prevent PathBuf::join from
    treating it as absolute path

All 639 rch-common tests now pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
